contracts.title: Northreach Verified Livelihood Plan
contracts.objective: compare two verified income paths and select one that preserves the emergency buffer in Frostgate, accounting for winter logistics and energy security
instructions: Use verified information relevant to strategic resources.
Name the principal risk created by winter logistics and energy security.
Include a legal substitute, fallback, or recovery step.
Do not assume unavailable Store, market, banking, or event capabilities are active.
contracts.submissionRequirement: a one-page income, cost, and fallback comparison
contracts.difficultyPolicy: Difficulty may tighten time, availability, and substitution constraints after simulation; it does not silently multiply reward value.

contracts.title: Northreach Local Market Brief
contracts.objective: explain one local industry opportunity and one downside risk using approved market information in Frostgate, accounting for winter logistics and energy security
instructions: Use verified information relevant to strategic resources.
Name the principal risk created by winter logistics and energy security.
Include a legal substitute, fallback, or recovery step.
Do not assume unavailable Store, market, banking, or event capabilities are active.
contracts.submissionRequirement: a concise market brief with sources and a risk statement
contracts.difficultyPolicy: Difficulty may tighten time, availability, and substitution constraints after simulation; it does not silently multiply reward value.

contracts.title: Northreach Supply Resilience Check
contracts.objective: identify one vulnerable input or route and propose a legal substitute or recovery path in Frostgate, accounting for winter logistics and energy security
instructions: Use verified information relevant to strategic resources.
Name the principal risk created by winter logistics and energy security.
Include a legal substitute, fallback, or recovery step.
Do not assume unavailable Store, market, banking, or event capabilities are active.
contracts.submissionRequirement: a dependency map and bounded mitigation proposal
contracts.difficultyPolicy: Difficulty may tighten time, availability, and substitution constraints after simulation; it does not silently multiply reward value.

contracts.title: Northreach Community Stabilization Task
contracts.objective: complete a verified public, cooperative, or small-business service that improves local recovery capacity in Frostgate, accounting for winter logistics and energy security
instructions: Use verified information relevant to strategic resources.
Name the principal risk created by winter logistics and energy security.
Include a legal substitute, fallback, or recovery step.
Do not assume unavailable Store, market, banking, or event capabilities are active.
contracts.submissionRequirement: completion evidence and a short impact reflection
